name: personal-codex-tools
description: Personal Codex skills and helper tools for desktop automation and practical performance work.

interface.shortDescription: KDE desktop automation and practical optimization skills.
interface.longDescription: A personal collection of Codex skills and bundled scripts for operating KDE Plasma sessions and optimizing real-world software with evidence from profiling, runtimes, compilers, and production-like environments.
defaultPrompt: Use $kde-computer-use to inspect this KDE desktop.
Use $practical-code-optimization to speed up this code.
